title: Aliasing, Effective Type, Provenance, and Type Punning · Failure Case: Strict Aliasing Contract
summary: A high-performance decoder casts byte storage into structures and changes output only under optimization. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem strict aliasing contract increment in defined binary decoder with provenance notes. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Preserve optimizer-visible non-aliasing rules and test any deliberate compiler-extension policy.
Access allocated and copied storage through types permitted by effective-type rules or defined character-byte paths.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Strict Aliasing Contract · Theory Strict Aliasing Contract
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory native-systems team handles memory case 7118. Produce bounded C evidence to decode representation bytes through a defined copy; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Preserve optimizer-visible non-aliasing rules and test any deliberate compiler-extension policy.

steps.title: Build Strict Aliasing Contract evidence · Theory Strict Aliasing Contract
steps.instruction:
For this theory demonstration of cmem-strict-aliasing-contract, write the complete compile-ready C program headed "/* Evidence: cmem-strict-aliasing-contract-10u8sc */" for changed case 7687. It must decode representation bytes through a defined copy, reject one changed boundary, print an observable result and invariant, and return nonzero when the invariant fails. Keep instant code within the PicoC 3.2.2 practice subset; do not claim C23, optimizing compiler, sanitizer, ABI, thread, operating-system, FFI, load, or production evidence until its explicit controlled transfer gate passes.
